violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Container was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice for drinks. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the prep unit and slide cooler observed in poor repair, split away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025

The floor and ceiling in the kitchen area are in poor repair. There are several cracked floor tiles and heavily stained ceiling tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
